summary: W1446 packages the W1445 W990 primitive unit-components provider into W981 unit strict-exact/isomorphism full data, records that the W981 unit data chooses the W939 unit mapping-cone model, and verifies that W989 rebuilds localized-unit data while preserving the localized right adjoint and localized adjunction; product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1446 packages W990 data through W981/W989 rather than completing the four-task product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.
Replace the W990/W981/W989 routed provider surface with actual constructions that satisfy the positive-witness supplement instead of only reusing existing nonterminal provider packages.
